response.step_by_step_log: 1. Performed a full scene analysis of the video to identify vocal segments. 2. Identified the song as '美人' (Bijin) by Chanmina through on-screen text. 3. Confirmed the performers as VTubers Hakos Baelz and Kureiji Ollie. 4. Used search queries 'ちゃんみな 美人 歌詞' and 'Chanmina Bijin lyrics full' to find the official lyrics in both Japanese and English. 5. Constructed the JSON object with two main scenes: the performance and the post-performance talk.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song '美人' (Bijin) by VTubers Hakos Baelz and Kureiji Ollie, followed by a post-performance talk.

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz and Kureiji Ollie perform the song '美人' (Bijin) in front of an audience with elaborate lighting and choreography. The song metadata is shown on screen.
